ns1:revision.ns1:comment: add links to adjacent LUG events
ns1:revision.ns1:text:
==LUG 2008 Agenda==
Presentations and videos from the Lustre User Group (LUG) 2008, held in Sonoma, CA, are available below.
[http://picasaweb.google.com/overheardinpdx/LustreUserGroup2008 LUG2008 Photo Gallery] by Carl Wimmi
===April 28, Monday=== {| border=1 cellpadding=0 |- |'''''[[Media:Bojanic.pdf|Welcome & Introduction]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Bxu7b54zsDE (Video)] : Peter Bojanic, Director, Lustre Group, Sun |- |'''''Lustre™ Business Update''''' :Kevin Canady, Director of Business Development, Sun |- |'''''[[Media:Barton08.pdf|Lustre Engineering Update]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zb1JejATbZY (Video)] :Eric Barton, Lustre Lead Engineer, Sun |- |'''''[[Media:Lug-2008-Braam.pdf|Sun Storage Perspective & Lustre Architecture]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2gk6R8tiN7Q (Video)] :Peter Braam, VP of Lustre, Sun |- |'''''[[Media:Lustre-RoadmapUpdate-20080428.pdf|Lustre Roadmap Update]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xD-WtZeUhC0 (Video)] :Bryon Neitzel, Lustre Group, Sun |- |'''''[[Media:Stearman_LUG_2008.pdf|Lustre at LLNL]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZEvr2luD_yY (Video)] :Marc Stearman, LLNL |- |'''''[[Media:LUG-talk-canon.pdf|A Global File System with Lustre &LNET Routers]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MJGU5ZYCHho (Video)] :Shane Canon, ORNL |- |'''''[[Media:LUG08_Cray_HPCS.pdf|DARPA HPCS Project]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lEoysPR8K-c (Video)] :John Carrier, Cray |- |'''''[[Media:Lustre_HSM_Lug08.pdf|ILM- Lustre HSM]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zT_QOLBG7m4 (Video)] :Aurelien Degremont, CEA |- |'''''[[Media:Hedges_-LustreUsersGroup2008.pdf|Customer Support & I/O Applications from a LLNL Perspective]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wGCwyYQJ0hI (Video)] :Richard Hedges, LLNL |}
===Tuesday, April 29=== {| border=1 cellpadding=0 |- |'''''Keynote Speaker :Andy Bechtolsheim, Storage Group, Sun |- |'''''FlexRex: HPC Community Portal :Rich Brueckner, HPC Group, Sun |- |'''''[[Media:LUG08-Lustre-Application-IO.pdf|Scientific Application Performance with Lustre]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=N_cccu9Hf2w (Video)] :Di (Tom) Wang, Lustre Group, Sun |- |'''''[[Media:LUG08-Lustre-LNET-selftest.pdf|Lnet Selftest]]''''' :Isaac Huang, Lustre Group, Sun |- |'''''[[Media:LUG08-IU-wan.pdf|BOF on Lustre over WAN]]''''' :Eric Barton, ORNL, TACC, IU |- |'''''[[Media:LUG2008-NEARSC-Cardo.pdf|Lustre Tools Session-Backup&Quota]]''''' :Nicholas P. Cardo, LBNL |- |'''''[[Media:Shine_LUG2008.pdf|Lustre Tools Session-Shine, Administration Tool]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mMMJv7ThnK4 (Video)] :Stephane Thiell, CEA |- |'''''[[Media:LUG08-DDN-sm.pdf|Lustre Partner: DataDirect Networks]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kn9zo34nWVY (Video)] :Dave Fellinger, DDN |- |}
===Lustre Expertise Session:=== {| border=1 cellpadding=0 |- |'''''[[Media:LUG08-Lustre-uOSS.pdf|Userspace Server Architecture]]''''' :Andreas Dilger, Lustre Group, Sun |- |'''''[[Media:Lustre_on_ZFS-Ricardo.pdf|Lustre on ZFS]]''''' :Ricardo Correia, Lustre Group, Sun |- |'''''[[Media:LUG08-Lustre-NFS.pdf|NFS/pNFS export]]''''' :Oleg Drokin, Lustre Group, Sun |- |'''''[[Media:LUG2008-Lustre-cmd.pdf|Clustered Metadata (CMD)]]''''' :Andreas Dilger, Lustre Group, Sun |- |'''''[[Media:LUG08-head-mds-danilov.pdf|Metadata Server Stack]]''''' :Nikita Danilov, Lustre Group, Sun |- |'''''[[Media:LUG08-som-vitaly-fertman.pdf|Metadata Performance with Size on MDS]]''''' :Vitaly Fertman, Lustre Group, Sun |} ===Wednesday, April 30=== {| border=1 cellpadding=0 |- |'''''Joint CEA/NNSA BOF on PetaScale I/O Issues :Mark Gary, LLNL |- |'''''[[Media:LUG08-Linux_HPC_Software_Stack.pdf|Linux HPC Software Stack]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dugKfSzpcMg (Video)] :Makia Minich, Lustre Group, Sun |- |'''''Lustre Engineering Panel Q&A''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=08qwLB6fIZ4 (Video)] :Lustre Group, Sun |- |} [[Lustre User Group 2007|<- LUG'07]] | [[Lustre User Group 2009|LUG'09 ->]]
[[Category: LUG]] [[Category: Events]]
